relativeTime.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
relativeTime.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relativeTime.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.advice: Weaker cover than expected — check irrigation and fertilization.

low.label: Low / stressed
low.advice: Likely water stress or delayed emergence — cross-check with sensor data.

bare.label: Bare soil / water
bare.advice: No vegetation detected on the plot.

overview.subtitle: A live snapshot of your farm: sensors, soil moisture, and plot status.
overview.parcelsCount: {count, plural, one {# registered plot} other {# registered plots}}

empty.welcomeBody: You haven't registered a plot yet. Create one to pair an ESP32 sensor and start monitoring your soil live.
empty.featureAdviceDesc: AI diagnostic from the very first reading.
empty.verificationRequired: Identity verification is required to pair a sensor.
empty.previewBadge: Preview — available after your first plot

kpi.parcelsToVerify: {count, plural, one {# plot to check} other {# plots to check}}

status.weatherUnavailableDetail: No geolocated plot, or the weather service is unavailable.
status.noSensorsDetail: Add an IoT sensor to your plots to start monitoring.
status.troubledDetail: {troubled, plural, one {# sensor} other {# sensors}} offline or pending — {parcelCount, plural, one {# plot monitored} other {# plots monitored}}.
status.okDetail: {active, plural, one {# active sensor} other {# active sensors}} across {parcelCount, plural, one {# plot} other {# plots}}.

trend.title: Trend
trend.noSensorData: Not enough sensor data yet to plot a trend.

error.title: Something went wrong on this page
error.body: Some data couldn't be loaded. You can try again, or come back later if the problem persists.

list.parcelsCount: {count, plural, one {# registered plot} other {# registered plots}}
list.subtitle: Click a plot to see its telemetry, thresholds, and diagnostic.
list.unverifiedBody: You must first have your documents validated before registering a plot.
list.emptyBody: Create your first plot to activate IoT ingestion.
list.clickToView: Click to see telemetry, sensors, and the AI diagnostic.

new.title: New plot
new.subtitle: Enter the plot's details. The GeoJSON polygon will be used by the irrigation and alerting modules.

errors.surface_area_invalid: The area must be a strictly positive number.
errors.geojson_syntax: Invalid polygon — draw at least 3 points on the map.
errors.verification_required: Your account isn't verified yet. Submit your documents to continue.
errors.role_not_allowed: Only FARMER accounts can register a plot.
errors.parcel_create_failed: Saving failed on the server. Please try again shortly.

form.delimitHelp: Click on the map to place the polygon's vertices. Minimum 3 points.

tabs.viewAllOnSatellite: View all plots on the Satellite page →

devices.title: ESP32 sensors
devices.unverifiedBody: You must first have your documents validated before pairing a sensor to a plot.
devices.emptyTitle: No sensor paired to this plot.
devices.emptyBody: Pair your ESP32 to activate telemetry ingestion (KAT-03).
devices.deleteTitle: Permanent deletion — only possible before the first reading.
devices.detachTitle: Detach the sensor from this plot. History is kept.
devices.unlinkedNotice: This sensor has been detached from the plot. Its history remains available. Pair it to another plot from its page to reactivate it.
devices.confirmHardUnpair: Delete sensor {deviceId}? This action is permanent (no reading has been sent yet).

pair.device_already_paired: A sensor is already paired to this plot. Detach it before adding another one.
pair.verification_required: Your professional account must be verified to pair a sensor.
pair.role_not_allowed: Only a verified farmer can pair a sensor.

unpair.device_has_telemetry: This sensor has already sent readings. Deleting its history will be available in a future version (KAT-12).

pairDialog.title: Pair an ESP32 sensor
pairDialog.idHelp: The ID is printed on the sensor's casing (format {format}).

reveal.title: API key for sensor {deviceId}
reveal.body: Copy this key now and flash it into your ESP32's firmware.
reveal.warning: You won't be able to view it again afterwards.
reveal.confirmCheckbox: I confirm I've saved the key. I understand it won't be shown again.

rotateDialog.title: Regenerate the API key
rotateDialog.body: A new key will be generated for sensor {deviceId}.
rotateDialog.warning: The old key will stop working immediately.
rotateDialog.note: You'll need to reflash the firmware with the new value.
rotateDialog.ack: I understand the old key will be revoked.

unlinkDialog.title: Detach sensor {deviceId}
unlinkDialog.body: The sensor will be detached from plot {parcelName}. Concretely:
unlinkDialog.bullet1: The old API key stops working as soon as the ESP32 sends its next transmission.
unlinkDialog.bullet2: The reading history remains stored under this plot.
unlinkDialog.bullet3: To reuse this sensor on another plot, open its page and click “Pair a sensor” using the same ID {deviceId} — a new key will be generated.
unlinkDialog.ack: I understand the sensor's API key will be invalidated.

diagnostic.title: AI Diagnostic
diagnostic.subtitle: Analysis of your sensor, weather, and satellite data by the agronomic AI.
diagnostic.disabledInFlight: A diagnostic is already in progress

errors.diagnostic_already_in_progress: A diagnostic is already in progress for this plot.
errors.verification_required: Your account must be verified to request a diagnostic.
errors.role_not_allowed: Only farmers can request a diagnostic.
errors.not_authenticated: Session expired — please sign in again.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

diagnostic.failedRetry: The diagnostic failed. You can request a new one.

telemetry.title: Sensors — Readings
telemetry.emptyHasHistoryBody: The reading history remains available via the "Sensor history" card below. To resume data collection, pair a new ESP32 sensor to this plot.
telemetry.emptyNoHistoryBody: If you just paired an ESP32, the first reading arrives within 15 minutes. Check the sensor pairing above.

relative.days: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

thresholds.title: Alert thresholds
thresholds.unverifiedNotice: You must be verified to save thresholds. Viewing remains available.
thresholds.helpText: Leave Min or Max empty to disable that side. Alerts are sent at most once every 24 h per metric.
thresholds.errorVerificationRequired: You must be verified to save thresholds.

errors.surface_area_invalid: The area must be a strictly positive number.
errors.geojson_syntax: Invalid polygon — draw at least 3 points on the map.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.parcel_create_failed: Update failed on the server. Please try again.

form.delimitHelp: Click on the map to reposition the vertices. Minimum 3 points.

list.subtitle: Manage your sales listings on the B2B agricultural marketplace.
list.unverifiedBody: You must first have your documents validated before publishing a listing.
list.emptyBody: Publish your first listing to become visible to restaurants.
list.expiresIn: {count, plural, one {Expires in # day} other {Expires in # days}}

new.title: New listing
new.subtitle: Publish your product on FarMarket. The listing expires automatically after 7 days and can be renewed.

errors.price_invalid: The price must be greater than 0.
errors.quantity_invalid: The quantity must be greater than 0.
errors.not_authenticated: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.verification_required: Your account isn't verified yet. Submit your documents to continue.
errors.role_not_allowed: Only FARMER accounts can publish a listing.
errors.photo_too_large: A photo exceeds the 2 MB limit.
errors.invalid_photo_type: Only images are accepted (JPEG, PNG, WebP…).

form.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: Organic Souss tomatoes — grade A
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your product: variety, growing conditions, packaging…

errors.no_fields_to_update: Change at least one field before saving.
errors.not_ad_owner: You do not own this listing.
errors.not_editable: Only active listings can be edited.
errors.photo_too_large: Each photo must not exceed 2 MB.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.not_authenticated: Session expired. Please sign in again.

form.photosLabel: Photos (leave empty to keep the current photos)
form.newPhotosNotice: {count, plural, one {# new photo} other {# new photos}} — will replace all existing photos.
form.photosHelp: Max 5 photos · 2 MB per photo · image formats only

list.title: Incoming orders
list.subtitle: Restaurants are anonymized — you only see an opaque handle and the delivery region. VitaChain handles logistics coordination.
list.emptyBody: When a restaurant places an order on your listings, it will appear here.
list.scrollHint: Scroll horizontally on mobile to see all columns.

row.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Reason (optional, do not include contact details)

weather.title: Current conditions & forecast.
weather.subtitle: OpenWeatherMap data, computed at the centroid of the selected plot's polygon. Backend cache 3 h.
weather.noParcelsBody: Create a plot with its GeoJSON polygon to activate local weather.
weather.unavailableBody: The backend is unreachable, OpenWeatherMap returned an error, or the API key isn't configured server-side (env variable OPENWEATHERMAP_API_KEY).

page.title: Sentinel-2 view & vegetation vigor.
page.subtitle: NDVI index computed from the most recent cloud-free Sentinel-2 image, clipped to the plot's polygon. Backend cache 12 h.
page.noParcelsBody: Create a plot with its GeoJSON polygon to activate satellite imagery.

panel.imageAlt: Sentinel-2 NDVI tile clipped to the plot
panel.imageUnavailable: NDVI image unavailable for this period. The average is still computed from the latest cloud-free composite.
panel.unavailableBody: No cloud-free Sentinel-2 image was found for this period, the backend is unreachable, or the Sentinel Hub OAuth credentials aren't configured server-side (env variables <code1>SENTINEL_HUB_CLIENT_ID</code1> / <code2>SENTINEL_HUB_CLIENT_SECRET</code2>). Sentinel-2 data is refreshed roughly every 5 days.

page.title: Your account.
page.subtitle: Profile information and verification status.
page.verifiedBody: You can pair sensors and register plots.
page.unverifiedBody: Pairing a sensor and creating a plot require identity verification.

profileForm.regionHelp: This information is visible to restaurants on your listings.

actions.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
actions.nameTooLong: First name and last name must be under 80 characters.
